data.title: GREEN: Update blue-team-filter.md to recognize escalate_to_epic
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Add escalate_to_epic to the blue-team-filter.md filtering criteria and output schema.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] blue-team-filter.md contains escalate_to_epic recognition
  Verify: grep -q 'escalate_to_epic' plugins/dso/agents/blue-team-filter.md
- [ ] taxonomy test assertions for blue team pass
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-escalate-to-epic-taxonomy.sh
